title: niffgaff Double Over Door Hook 4 Hooks Heavy Duty Metal Hanger for Coat Towel Bag Robe with Anti-Scratch Pads Fits Doors Up to 1-3/4 Inch Thick White 4-Pack
features: Fits Doors up to ​1¾ inches Thick ：Designed to fit doors up to ​1¾ inches thick, each hook includes two support pads that can be added for thinner doors, providing extra stability and preventing wobbling or damage to your door

Anti-Rust and Long-Lasting：The hooks feature a premium rust-resistant powder coating, ensuring they maintain their sleek black finish over time, even in humid environments like bathrooms or laundry rooms

Easy Installation, No Drilling Required：No tools, screws, or drilling are needed. Simply place the hooks over your door, and they're ready to use—perfect for renters or anyone looking for a hassle-free solution

Sleek and Versatile Design：The modern black finish and clean, minimalist design make these hooks suitable for various settings, from bedrooms and bathrooms to kitchens and offices, blending seamlessly with any decor
Child-Friendly Height: The 9-inch-long hook is positioned at an accessible height, making it easier for younger users to hang or retrieve items independently
description: Product Description Holds Up to 80 lb Securely Reinforced metal design supports heavy loads without bending—ideal for coats, bags, or even weights. Secure Fit, Scratch-Free Design Soft EVA pads protect your door from damage, while the durable metal hook stays firmly in place.
